items.title: Arteta's big Champions League final selection dilemmas
items.summary: It's Arsenal's biggest game in two decades - and Mikel Arteta has some decisions to make.

items.title: Palace wait on Iraola with Lampard among plan Bs
items.summary: Crystal Palace are waiting on an answer from Andoni Iraola but Coventry boss Frank Lampard could be a plan B for the Conference League winners.

items.title: Gordon set to have Barcelona medical after Newcastle agree deal
items.summary: Anthony Gordon will undergo a medical at Barcelona on Thursday after the club agreed a fee with Newcastle to sign the winger.

items.summary: Why Paris St-Germain will be going into Saturday's Champions League final against Arsenal with one advantage.

items.title: New York mayor wears Arsenal kurta during Eid prayers
items.summary: The mayor of New York City Zohran Mamdani takes his Arsenal super-fandom up a notch by attending Eid al-Adha prayers in the Bronx wearing an Arsenal-themed tunic.

items.title: What are 'mentality monsters'?
items.summary: Our Ask Me Anything team looks into the phrase 'mentality monsters' and why it has recently been associated with Arsenal.

items.title: Budapest is perfect for the Champions League final – but tournament remains a closed shop
items.summary: Hungary’s rich footballing heritage is unlikely to make an impact on Europe’s premier club competition as clubs from small countries stand no chance Before the Champions League final, I want to spare a thought for one of the eliminated semi-finalists.
